opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I am literally tearing my own skin off; the itching is driving me completely insane and I haven't slept in three days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The itching all over has been relentless for three days, I keep scratching until I bleed, and I cannot sleep — I needed help tonight rather than waiting.

symptom_narrative.onset: flared badly over the last 72 hours, on a background of skin that has been getting drier and itchier through the winter
symptom_narrative.duration: about three days of severe itching, worsening
symptom_narrative.character: intense, unrelenting itch all over; skin feels very dry, rough, and 'like sandpaper'
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable — 'driving me insane', worst at night
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over, mostly the torso, arms and legs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse at night, causing repeated waking; worse during the dry winter weather
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has really helped so far
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: flares badly after hot showers and the house is kept very warm with central heating
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: scratching has broken the skin and it bleeds in places; feels exhausted and very agitated from the lack of sleep
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the skin has been dry and itchy on and off but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: normally independent, but tonight is worn out and distressed from three nights of almost no sleep

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular medications, and nothing new started recently

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; keeps the house heated with central heating over winter; takes hot showers

communication_style.typical_message_style: highly distressed, agitated, describing the itch in dramatic terms after three sleepless nights

objective_data_offered.value: skin looks very dry, rough and flaky over the arms, chest and legs, with scratch marks and a few spots of pinpoint bleeding where it's been scratched raw
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-shown over video in poor lighting; not a clinician skin examination

objective_data_offered.value: skin feels dry and rough 'like sandpaper' everywhere
